case_title: GREGORY RATLIFF VS. TURO, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,447.00 FILED BY RATLIFF, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT TURO, INC. GREENHOUSE, REBECCA H ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (SEE SERVICE) SERVED DEC-11-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GREENHOUSE, REBECCA H
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $327.00) SERVED DEC-05-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TURO, INC.
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF RATLIFF, GREGORY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT TURO, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RATLIFF, GREGORY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURO, INC. GREENHOUSE, REBECCA H $4,010.00 PRINCIPAL, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,225.00, DEFENDANT TURO, INC. IS TO PAY PLAINTIFF GREGROY RATLIFF. DEFENDANT REBECCA GREENHOUSE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF PROVED THE FOLLOWING DAMAGES AFTER PAYMENT OF LIBERTY MUTUAL $1628 ($3728 - $2100) DAMAGE TO CAR BODY. $1382 ($2040 ESTIMATE MODULAR REPAIR LESS PAYMENT BY LIBERTY MUTUAL $648). DIMINISHED IN VALUE $1000 ($1628 + $1382 + $1000) = $4010. COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE SERVICE AMOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-11-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF GREGORY RATLIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TURO, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY TODD ARMSTRONG. DEFENDANT REBECCA GREENHOUSE IS NOT PRESENT. WITNESS FOR THE DEFENDANT LIBERTY MUTUAL INS. KEN VIERRA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RATLIFF, GREGORY AS TO DEFENDANT GREENHOUSE, REBECCA H
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
